case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. CLAUDIA ANAYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100090647) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
